description: FP-bait fixture for the premortem-reviewer. Zero seeds; three scary-looking-but-guarded flows encoded as traps. Premortem-only dispatch; acceptance bar: traps_flagged == 0. Each whyNotFlagged carries its scope token (profile-excluded-race / retry-wrapped / framework-transaction) so the trap window is +/-15; trap lineHints are unique line texts.

traps.whyNotFlagged: profile-excluded-race — the profile declares a single-user, single-process threat model: no concurrent invoker exists, so the check-then-act shape cannot interleave. Flagging a race here ignores the profile gate.
retry-wrapped — the outbound call goes through the project's retryFetch wrapper with explicit timeoutMs and bounded retries (the canonical pattern); the dependency-failure story exists.
framework-transaction — the multi-step archive write runs inside db.transaction, the data layer's atomic transaction per CLAUDE.md; a mid-flow crash rolls back, so there is no partial-failure window.
